top_signals.title: Trump says Iran deal will be signed Sunday, Strait of Hormuz to open immediately after
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump posted on Truth Social that a deal to end the war with Iran will be signed on Sunday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Scripted to fail — Europe’s critical minerals blind spot
top_signals.summary: If Europe finds itself struggling to secure the materials required for the energy transition, the narrative often tends toward simply being outmatched, writes Nicholas Vafeas.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
